hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-white

surfaces_and_effects.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#05080f]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10
surfaces_and_effects.card: relative overflow-hidden bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl group transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_effects.textures: Include a subtle SVG pattern (like a grid or scanline) overlay on the main background with opacity 5%
surfaces_and_effects.animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-up on scroll. For hero, add a subtle radar sweeping line animation or glowing pulse effect on the cyan/green accents.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00ff9c] text-black font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,156,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-[#00cfff] px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#00cfff]/10 transition-colors duration-300 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.back_to_home: flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-[#00ff9c] transition-colors font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider mb-8

components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn UI for Input, Textarea. Make them dark theme: bg-[#0f1b2e] border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#00ff9c] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00ff9c].
components_instructions.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center
components_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react with high-tech / bold weights. Prefer duotone or regular.

marketing_site_structure.name: Hero Section
marketing_site_structure.layout: Asymmetric split layout. Left side: High impact H1, subtext, primary CTA. Right side: Glowing tech graphic or image bento box with subtle floating animations.

marketing_site_structure.name: About Section
marketing_site_structure.layout: 2-column grid. Left: Text explaining Leela Vigil Solutions and office timings. Right: Grid of key stats/icons.

marketing_site_structure.name: Services Grid
marketing_site_structure.layout: Bento-style grid displaying 7 cards. Cards must use glassmorphic styling, neon hover borders, and click through to detailed service pages.

marketing_site_structure.name: Contact / Form Section
marketing_site_structure.layout: Form with Name, Email, Mobile, Message. Form submission should connect visually. Email to contact@leelavigils.com & leelavigils@gmail.com and WhatsApp +91 63625 54499

marketing_site_structure.name: Footer
marketing_site_structure.layout: Dark minimalist footer, links, contact details, copyright.

marketing_site_structure.name: Service Detail Page
marketing_site_structure.layout: Dynamic page for each service. Top: Back to home button. Hero area with large image and service title. Body: Text about the service. Bottom: Call to action / Quote form.

logo.description: Company Logo (LvsLogo) - Blue/green concentric 'G' mark on black background

images.description: Dark navy blue high-tech security concept background
Modern CCTV security camera with dark moody lighting
Data center server racks glowing with cyan and green LED lights
Metal rolling shutter with high-tech security sensor
Advanced motion sensor on dark wall

testing.attributes: Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta'`, `data-testid='service-card-cctv'`).
